**Our Story**

# Turning beginners into freelancers, solving businesses' technical challenges.

Mission & Vision

## Why We're Obsessed With Linux

Linux powers most servers, cloud platforms, and DevOps pipelines. We put that power and its income in your hands.

🎯

### Our Mission

To make professional Linux skills accessible to anyone, anywhere, and to turn those skills into real, dependable income — for individuals building a freelance career and for businesses that rely on Linux infrastructure every day.

We deliver on this through two pillars:

- **Linux Freelancing Training** — practical trainings in server administration, DevOps, cloud infrastructure, and automation, paired with the freelance business skills (proposals, pricing, client communication) needed to actually get hired on Upwork, Fiverr, and Toptal.
- **Linux Cloud Support** — hands-on, expert support for businesses: VPS setup, server hardening, migrations, monitoring, and emergency troubleshooting, delivered by the same specialists who train our students.

🔭

### Our Vision

A world where Linux literacy is the fastest, most reliable on-ramp into the global freelance economy, and where no business ever loses time or revenue to a server they don't understand.

Concretely, we're working toward a future where:

- Any motivated beginner, regardless of location, degree, or background, can become a confident, employable Linux freelancer in months, not years.
- School of Freelancing is the first name businesses think of when they need affordable, trustworthy Linux and cloud support.
- Our graduates form a global, self-sustaining community of Linux freelancers who hire, refer, and mentor one another for life.

What We Offer

## Two Ways to Work With Us

Want to learn Linux and freelance? Or need a Linux expert to run your infrastructure today? Either way, we've built a track for you.

### 🎓 Linux Freelancing Training

🐧

**Linux Fundamentals to Advanced Sysadmin**
Ubuntu, Debian, and CentOS/RHEL — command line, file permissions, networking, security, and shell scripting, taught from zero.

☁️

**Cloud & DevOps Skills**
VPS deployment, Docker, Nginx, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure automation across AWS, DigitalOcean, Hetzner, and Linode.

🤖

**Specialized, High-Demand Tracks**
Hermes Agent Training, AI Workspace Training, and Bulk SMS System Development — niche skills with far less competition than generic dev work.

💼

**Freelance Business Skills**
Profile optimization, proposal writing, pricing, and client communication, so your Linux skills actually convert into paid contracts.

[Explore Training Programs →](/freelancing-training/)

### 🛠️ Linux Cloud Support

🖥️

**Linux System Administration**
Server setup, hardening, patching, performance tuning, and ongoing maintenance for businesses of any size.

📲

**Bulk SMS API Integration**
Full setup and ongoing support for Telnyx and Twilio Bulk SMS APIs, deployed and managed on Linux infrastructure.

🧠

**Self-Hosted AI & Automation**
Self-hosted AI Workspace setup, Hermes Agent full setup, and Hummingbot full setup, deployed, secured, and supported on your own servers.

🚨

**Migration & Emergency Support**
Cloud migrations, downtime recovery, and on-call troubleshooting from real sysadmins, not an automated ticket queue.

[View Support Services →](/linux-ai-services/)
